signals.headline: Bitcoin Price Crashes to ~$64K, Down 50% from October 2025 Peak Amid $1
signals.raw:
Bitcoin Price Crashes to ~$64K, Down 50% from October 2025 Peak Amid $1.1B Liquidations | NO | HIGH confidence**  
Bitcoin has plunged sharply today, breaching $64,000 after failing key supports near $70,000, marking its largest raw dollar drawdown ever and a 50% drop from the $126,000 October 2025 high.[2][1]

signals.headline: Trump Nominates Kevin Warsh as Successor to Fed Chair Jerome Powell** | YES | HIGH confidence[1]
signals.raw:
Trump Nominates Kevin Warsh as Successor to Fed Chair Jerome Powell** | YES | HIGH confidence[1]

Former President Donald Trump announced on January 30, 2026, his intention to nominate Kevin Warsh, a former Fed governor, to replace Jerome Powell as Federal Reserve chair, citing Powell's slow rate cuts[1]. signals.headline: Mavs Fall to Spurs Despite Cooper Flagg's 31-Point Rookie Performance | NO | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Mavs Fall to Spurs Despite Cooper Flagg's 31-Point Rookie Performance | NO | HIGH confidence**  
The Dallas Mavericks lost 76-67 to the San Antonio Spurs, even as rookie **Cooper Flagg** delivered a stellar 31 points in the game.[1]
